nasb.text: So He was saying, “What is the kingdom of God like, and to what shall I compare it?

esv.text: He said therefore, “What is the kingdom of God like? And to what shall I compare it?

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“　神的國好像甚麼呢？我要把它比作甚麼呢？

ccb.text: 耶稣继续说：“上帝的国好像什么呢？我该把上帝的国比作什么呢？

csbs.text: 于是耶稣说：“神的国好比什么呢？我要把它比做什么呢？
